summary: Completed testing of highway shields feature for trucking navigation app. All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend tests confirm 25 highway shield markers appear on route from Council Bluffs, IA to Denver, CO. Shield markers use data-testid='highway-shield-marker' and load PNG images from /api/road-shield endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: server.ts line 263 - spans parameter includes 'routeNumbers' for HERE API route request
VERIFIED: server.ts lines 455-502 - /api/road-shield GET endpoint with in-memory caching, proxies to HERE Map Image API v3
VERIFIED: server.ts line 461 - Returns 400 if label or countryCode missing
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 926 - placeHighwayShields() function creates Leaflet markers with DivIcon
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 977 - Shield markers have data-testid='highway-shield-marker'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2560 - highwayShields array declared before span processing
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 2710-2748 - routeNumbers extraction from spans forEach loop
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3084-3085 - placeHighwayShields called after route drawn
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 2231-2232 - shields cleared in clearRoute function via shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers()
VERIFIED: index.css lines 49-53 - .highway-shield-icon class for transparent background and no pointer events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Highway shields feature fully implemented and tested. Backend /api/road-shield endpoint proxies to HERE Map Image API v3 with caching. Frontend extracts routeNumbers from HERE routing API spans and places Leaflet markers with shield images. 25 shields confirmed on Omaha-Denver route. All tests pass.

backend_road_shield_returns_png.details: Interstate (I-95), US Highway (US-20), and State Route shields return valid PNG images with content-type: image/png

backend_road_shield_400_on_missing_param.details: Returns 400 with error message when label or countryCode missing

backend_road_shield_caching.details: Second request served from in-memory cache (shieldCache Map)

frontend_route_numbers_extraction.details: HERE API spans include routeNumbers, extracted in NavigationView.tsx

highway_shield_markers_in_dom.details: Found 25 highway shield markers with data-testid='highway-shield-marker' after route calculation

shield_markers_positioned_on_route.details: Shields visible along gold route line on 2D map

shields_cleared_on_route_cancel.details: clearRoute function calls shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers() at line 2232

here_api_spans_includes_route_numbers.details: server.ts line 263 includes 'routeNumbers' in spans parameter

app_loads_correctly.details: App loads with splash screen, then login page

guest_login_works.details: Continue as Guest button works, navigates to Command Center

navigation_page_loads_with_map.details: Navigation view shows map with satellite imagery, search input, and controls
